107350704.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_FIRST

886581705.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_FIRST

60092582.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_A

26179321.english: You won't stop us this time, Eid!

822153947.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_A

249020420.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_FIRST

249020420.english: Let's take it down for good!

139215847.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_A

1026909344.en_literal: I think it's about time you got some rest.

469223563.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_B

745336622.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_FIRST

189115995.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1100

492097546.en_literal: I'll get hurt! Don't be so wary of me!

409943173.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0800
409943173.en_literal: You have a way with words.
409943173.english: And you, my good man, have an excellent eye.

142128084.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0900

142128084.en_literal: I've got to live up to everyone's expectations with everything I've got!
142128084.english: Don't say it like that, I'll start to feel the pressure!

904995317.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1000

154799985.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1100

790859817.jp_real: 君ほどの達人の参考になれるなら、いくらでも協力するからね。
790859817.en_literal: If I can be of any help to a master like you, I'll cooperate as much as you want.
790859817.english: I don't mind playing teacher, especially for such a motivated student.

221341867.en_literal: Ooh, it's a lump of high-grade ore!

647254052.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1500
647254052.en_literal: Ah, we're on the same wavelength.

660456107.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1700

673917635.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1800
673917635.jp_real: 美少女錬金術師は何でもできるね！

673917635.english: You pack a lot of punch for such an adorable package!

404974195.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1900
404974195.jp_real: イド君のためなら、仕方ないな。

404974195.english: Anything for you, my sour friend!

724817752.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2100

844613635.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2300
844613635.jp_real: まあね。って素直に受け取りたいけど、なんか含みを感じるなあ。
844613635.en_literal: Well, I'd like to take that at face value, but I can't shake this feeling that there's more to it.

732309.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2400
732309.jp_real: これは剣託といって、実存的な魔剣とは少し違うかな？
732309.en_literal: This is called "Ken-taku." It's a bit different from a practical sword, don't you think?
732309.english: Man, if I had half your confidence, my life woulda turned out way different.

22160406.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2500
22160406.jp_real: おっと、おさわりはダメだよ。危ないからね。
22160406.en_literal: Oops! You shouldn't touch me. It's dangerous.
22160406.english: You can look, but no touching. That would not bode well.

441255922.jp_real: おっと、これは油断できないね。

441255922.english: Uh-oh! I'd better sleep with one eye open!

821585648.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2800

605952604.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_NP0300

125247464.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0500

1042473705.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0800

917096060.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1400

917096060.english: You've got nothing to prove. You're already a chip off Ayato's block.

906567749.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1500

906567749.en_literal: I'm counting on you more than ever, Legendary!

401853309.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1600
401853309.jp_real: いいね。嫌いじゃないよ、そういうの

401853309.english: Oh, you tell me! Love that attitude!

127586585.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1700

792216465.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1800

755586258.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2100
755586258.english: Aww, you're gonna make me blush!
